properties.entry: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qna q WHERE 1 = 1
SELECT q.*, u.user_id AS member_id, u.name AS member_name FROM qna q JOIN users u ON q.user_id = u.user_id WHERE 1 = 1
SELECT q.*, u.user_id AS member_id, u.name AS member_name FROM qna q JOIN users u ON q.user_id = u.user_id WHERE q.qna_no = ?
UPDATE qna SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE qna_no = ?
INSERT INTO qna (user_id, title, content, status, view_count, reg_date) VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'WAITING', 0, NOW())
